core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix UK Real Estate solidity with Cyberpunk energy.
Emotion First: Sustainability isn't boring; it's electric and urgent.
Content is King: Data visualization is the hero.
Negative Space: Use deep navy voids to let the mint green pop.

grid_system.bento_marketing: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 auto-rows-[minmax(180px,auto)] gap-4

buttons.primary: bg-[#00FFAB] text-black hover:bg-[#00CC88] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,255,171,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#00FFAB]/30 text-[#00FFAB] hover:bg-[#00FFAB]/10 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-all hover:border-[#00FFAB]
buttons.ghost: text-slate-300 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.glass: bg-[#0A192F]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-xl hover:border-[#00FFAB]/50 transition-colors duration-300
cards.interactive: group relative overflow-hidden bg-[#0A192F]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_10px_40px_-10px_rgba(0,255,171,0.2)]

inputs.default: bg-[#0A192F]/50 border border-white/10 focus:border-[#00FFAB] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00FFAB] rounded-xl py-3 px-4 text-white placeholder:text-slate-500

borders.tracing_beam: relative after:absolute after:inset-0 after:rounded-2xl after:p-[1px] after:bg-gradient-to-r after:from-transparent after:via-[#00FFAB] after:to-transparent after:opacity-0 hover:after:opacity-100 after:transition-opacity

hero.alt: Modern sustainable UK home with large windows

landing_page.hero: Use framer-motion to create a 3D tilt effect on the main glass card. The background should be Deep Navy (#0A192F) with a subtle animated 'neural network' or grid pattern in low opacity.
landing_page.scroll_story: Implement 'Scroll-Storytelling' where sections fade in and slide up. Use sticky positioning for text while images change on the right.

dashboard.layout: Sidebar on the left (fixed), content on the right. Sidebar must be glassmorphism.
dashboard.sustainability_tracker: Use circular progress bars (SVG) for Energy Rating. Color code: A (Green) to G (Red). Animated 'counting up' numbers.
dashboard.chat: Layout should resemble WhatsApp/Telegram but strictly in the Deep Navy theme. User messages in #00FFAB (black text), AI messages in #1E293B (white text).

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure #00FFAB text is used on dark backgrounds only. For light backgrounds, use a darker teal.
